name: Screen Capture with Xwd
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Screen Capture with Xwd
SIGMA Description: Detects adversary creating screen capture of a full with xwd. Highly recommended using rule on servers, due high usage of screenshot utilities on user workstations

False positives:
- Legitimate use of screenshot utility

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%xwd%') AND ((LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-root%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-out%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%.xwd%') OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-out%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%.xwd%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Screen Capture with Xwd on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%xwd%') AND ((LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-root%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-out%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%.xwd%') OR (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-out%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%.xwd%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Screen Capture with Xwd

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Pawel Mazur SIGMA Title: Screen Capture with Xwd SIGMA Description: Detects adversary creating screen capture of a full with xwd. Highly recommended using rule on servers, due high usage of screenshot utilities on user workstations  False positives: - Legitimate use of screenshot utility  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
